title: Toasty Toasted Chicken
description: A salty and flaky show-off Algerian dish featuring crispy chicken breasts atop toasted bread for a low-fat-friendly breakfast option.

ingredients.name: Breadcrumbs
ingredients.notes: Made from whole-grain breadcrumbs for added fiber and nutrients

instructions: In a shallow dish, mix the all-purpose flour with the breadcrumbs and salt. Season the chicken breasts on both sides with black pepper.
Dip each chicken breast into the seasoned flour mixture, allowing any excess to fall off.
Heat 2 tablespoons of butter in a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Add the coated chicken breasts and cook for about 3 minutes on each side or until golden brown.
Transfer the chicken to a plate lined with paper towels to drain excess grease.

While the chicken cooks, prepare the toasts: spread a thin layer of dijon mustard onto one slice of bread, then drizzle with olive oil. Toast in a toaster or oven at 350°F (175°C) until golden brown and crispy. Repeat with another slice of bread for the second toast.
Combine the remaining 4 tablespoons of butter with lemon zest in a small saucepan over low heat to create a warm, spreadable compound butter.

Serve each chicken breast topped with one toasted piece of crusty bread (using half of the compound butter) and a dollop of the warm compound butter on top. Drizzle with extra dijon mustard if desired.
